filesModified.change: Scoped `.top-gradient` selector under `.hero` parent — changed from `.top-gradient { }` to `.hero .top-gradient { }` to prevent style leaking to PostHero and EventHero blocks
Renamed `hero-inner` class to `post-hero-inner` on the content wrapper div (line 38). The `hero` class was already removed from the section wrapper in a prior pass.
Renamed `hero-inner` class to `event-hero-inner` on the content wrapper div (line 83). The `hero` class was already removed from the section wrapper in a prior pass.

cssFilesVerified.status: already exists with correct scoped selector `.post-hero .top-gradient`
already exists with correct scoped selector `.event-hero .top-gradient`

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, EventHero, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs — unrelated to this change

syncStatus.notes: Warnings in sync check are pre-existing (Hero.php docblock missing for blockVariation/enableQuickNav, root wrapper mismatch for InspectorControls vs section). None introduced by this change.

testPage.notes: Test page reused — no new block instances added, only CSS scoping and class renaming changes

fixesApplied.description: PostHero.css already existed with `.post-hero .top-gradient` scoped styles — no change needed
EventHero.css already existed with `.event-hero .top-gradient` scoped styles — no change needed
The `hero` class was already removed from PostHero wrapper in a prior pass — confirmed correct as `post-hero relative overflow-visible`
The `hero` class was already removed from EventHero wrapper in a prior pass — confirmed correct as `event-hero relative overflow-visible`
Renamed `hero-inner` to `post-hero-inner` on PostHero content wrapper
Renamed `hero-inner` to `event-hero-inner` on EventHero content wrapper
